Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEvent
public class Event extends Object implements IEvent
Class that stores attributes for an Event
Version:
7.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Sania Ghori, Meer Ali
